loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (has_data=N) and will render as honest-blanks; only fed feeders (UPS, BPDB) report live data.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power flows for active feeders (UPS-01/02/03, BPDB-01/02, UPS-04). Incomers (Solar 1/2, Transformer 01/02) and UPS-05/06 are dark (no data) and render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Narrative is generated from the panel rollup; per-member narrative slots are honest-blank for offline feeders (GIC-01-N9, GIC-02-N1, GIC-15-N10, GIC-15-N11, GIC-02-N6, GIC-02-N7).

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total feeder consumption (active_power_total_kw) for live feeders; contracted supply (denominator) is unknown for this asset and honest-blanked. Per-member breakdowns are rendered for live feeders (UPS-01, UPS-02, UPS-03, BPDB-01, BPDB-02, UPS-04); dark feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06, Solar, Transformers) are omitted from the live rollup.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate trend from 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank their series segments.

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate stats (Voltage, Current Unbalance, Electrical Load) from active feeders; 2 of 8 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank their slots.
